label: Hostile Sentiment Escalation
description: When customer sentiment is hostile, any AI reply must be reviewed by a senior agent before sending

causal_translation.rule_text: Hostile customers are more likely to escalate publicly — AI replies must be carefully vetted.
causal_translation.shift_text: Senior agent review activated to prevent worsening the situation.
causal_translation.effect_text: Escalation required: TRUE. Reply routed to senior support.
